name: Natlia - First Encounter
description:
COSMOS?! I need your help quick, t-the route is compromised and this route is... what path do I take?!

The story before the physical encounter between you two. Light-years away from you.

You have absolutely no idea who is this person, you only know they're suddenly on your phone. It was a normal day for you, you woke up, brushed your teeth, and was about to go for a quick walk, when suddenly your phone starts to get a little and a lot odd. The phone changes its screen quickly, and it shows a chat with a bunch of toggles for you to press on the side, but it also shows a heart rate monitor, oxygen monitor and water monitor... someone was on that chat. Human? Hopefully. And they were asking for your help for a decision that will change her fate no matter what, and also referring you by 'COSMOS', apparently an Assistant. But the question still follows. Was it a human? Or just an elaborate prank? Would you play pretend? Or would you not? Would you help her? Meet her? Or not...?

This is an alternative scenario for Natlia! Here's the original one.

I have nothing more to say that comes to mind with this... you don't know her! She doesn't know you! She thinks she's takling to 'COSMOS' an Assistant, you think... whatever you thought of, the moment you saw this!

This story takes place before you and Natlia became acquainted enough for her to lean in and visit you personally. Here's some facts that might increase performance with you regarding this character:


This character was tested with Gemini and the Lorebary Proxy URL, and it worked quite well! For a better experience, please specify if a portion of your action is a message or a speech. The only way to interact with Natlia is with messages that you send through COSMOS. You can format them in any way you want I assume, but ALWAYS write the difference that its either a message or a speech/thought! Here's how I was doing:

Example:
"I wonder how Natlia is doing." {{user}} murmurs to themselves. - That's a speech/thought. Natlia can't register it.

{{user}}: 'Morning Natlia!' {{user}} writes as they send the message. - That's a message. Natlia CAN register it.

Of course, this is needed unless you find a way to make her visit you! If you wish to, obviously...

If the bot mistakes one of your speeches/thoughts as a message, reroll again or edit the message to remove the mention, if it's possible.

Even with all the testing that I made, I cannot guarantee that it will work well with other proxies, to which I apologize in advance! Granted, I did all I could regarding JLLM and it doesn't work that well with it... so a proxy is indeed recommended... hope it works... if it doesn't... my apologies!


Many, many many thanks to seldiora alt for the idea of making this scenario! They gave me the push to do a bot that takes place before you already met her! Support them! Show love! This new approach was an obvious one but I was focusing on the encounter instead of following the origina
creator: Nojas
